============
If/Then/Else
============

#eval if true then "foo" else "bar"

---

(module
  (hash_command
    (if
      (true)
      (string)
      (string))))

=============
If Needs Else
=============

#eval if true then "foo"

---

(module
  (hash_command
    (if
      (true)
      (string))))

===================
Nested If/Then/Else
===================

#eval if true then if false then "foo" else "bar" else "baz"

---

(module
  (hash_command
    (if
      (true)
      (if
        (false)
        (string)
        (string))
      (string))))

======
Unless
======

#check (unless true do PUnit.unit : PUnit)

---

(module
  (hash_command
    (parenthesized
      (application
        name: (application
          name: (identifier)
          arguments: (true))
        arguments: (do
          (projection
            term: (identifier)
            name: (identifier))))
      type: (identifier))))

=====
Match
=====

def foo (d : Bar) : Baz :=
  match d with
  | quux => 1

---

(module
  (definition
    name: (identifier)
    binders: (binders
      (explicit_binder
        name: (identifier)
        type: (identifier)))
    type: (identifier)
    body: (match
      scrutinees: (identifier)
      (match_arm
        patterns: (identifier)
        body: (number)))))

==============
Match Multiple
==============

def foo (a b c : Nat) :=
  match a, b, c with
  | _, _, _ => true

---

(module
  (definition
    name: (identifier)
    binders: (binders
      (explicit_binder
        name: (identifier)
        name: (identifier)
        name: (identifier)
        type: (identifier)))
    body: (match
      scrutinees: (identifier)
      scrutinees: (identifier)
      scrutinees: (identifier)
      (match_arm
        patterns: (hole)
        patterns: (hole)
        patterns: (hole)
        body: (true)))))

=========================
Match Multiple With Apply
=========================

#eval match 0 with
| 0 => id 2
| _ => id 4

---

(module
  (hash_command
    (match
      (number)
      (match_arm
        (number)
        (application
          (identifier)
          (number)))
      (match_arm
        (hole)
        (application
          (identifier)
          (number))))))

================
Match Expression
================

#eval match Nat.succ 3 with
  | _ => true

---

(module
  (hash_command
    (match
      scrutinees: (application
        name: (projection
          term: (identifier)
          name: (identifier))
        arguments: (number))
      (match_arm
        patterns: (hole)
        body: (true)))))

============================
Match Multi-Line Arm Body
============================

def f (x : Option Nat) : Nat :=
  match x with
  | some n =>
    let y := n + 1
    y * 2
  | none => 0

---

(module
  (definition
    name: (identifier)
    binders: (binders
      (explicit_binder
        name: (identifier)
        type: (application
          name: (identifier)
          arguments: (identifier))))
    type: (identifier)
    body: (match
      scrutinees: (identifier)
      (match_arm
        patterns: (application
          name: (identifier)
          arguments: (identifier))
        body: (let
          name: (identifier)
          value: (binary_expression
            left: (identifier)
            right: (number))
          body: (binary_expression
            left: (identifier)
            right: (number))))
      (match_arm
        patterns: (identifier)
        body: (number)))))
